Who We Are

More Than a
Pool Builder.
A Trusted Partner.

When you ask for the best and most reasonably priced pool builder in the area — our name comes up first.

B & J Pools LLC has been building and renovating pools for over 50 years. Bobby and his team bring unmatched craftsmanship, clear communication, and fair pricing to every single project — commercial or residential.

What We Offer

Complete Pool
Solutions

From the first shovel in the ground to years of ongoing maintenance — B & J Pools handles every phase of your pool project with precision and care.

01 — CONSTRUCTION
Concrete Pools

Custom concrete pools built from the ground up. Fully designed to your specifications, engineered for durability, finished to perfection for commercial and residential properties.

Ground Up Build Custom Design Commercial Residential
02 — CONSTRUCTION
Fiberglass Pools

Pre-formed fiberglass pools installed with precision. Faster installation, lower maintenance, and a smooth finish that lasts for decades.

Quick Install Low Maintenance Durable Finish
03 — RENOVATION
Concrete Renovation

Breathe new life into an aging pool. We resurface, remodel, and restore concrete pools — updating finishes, fixing structural issues, modernizing the entire look.

Resurfacing Structural Repair Remodeling
04 — MAINTENANCE
Pool Cleaning & Maintenance

Regular scheduled cleaning and maintenance to keep your pool pristine, safe, and swim-ready year-round. We handle everything so you don't have to.

Regular Cleaning Water Chemistry Scheduled Service
05 — REPAIRS
Pump, Filter & Plumbing

Full pump and filter system service, repair, and replacement. Complete plumbing repair and installation to keep your pool operating at peak efficiency.

Pump Repair Filter Service Plumbing
06 — FULL SERVICE
Comprehensive Service

End-to-end pool care covering repairs, installations, maintenance, and emergency service. One trusted company for every pool need — commercial and residential.

Repairs Installation Emergency Service

Our Process

Built Right.
Every Time.

01

Consultation

We meet with you to understand your vision, budget, and timeline. Bobby personally walks every project site and advises on the best approach.

02

Design & Quote

We provide a clear, detailed, and competitive quote with no surprises. You know exactly what you're getting before we break ground.

03

Construction

Our experienced crew gets to work — excavating, forming, plumbing, and building your pool with the craftsmanship 50+ years demands.

04

Completion

We walk you through every detail of your finished pool. Your satisfaction is our standard — we don't leave until you're 100% happy.
